test_case: Directly toggle row renders with label and switch
expected: "Directly" label visible, Switch component present, description text visible
notes: "Directly" label visible, Switch in ON state, description text present.

test_case: Switch is in ON state when usage is 'fin'
expected: Switch shows checked state (aria-checked=true)
notes: Switch has [checked] attribute, visually orange ON state.

test_case: Info icon is visible next to Directly label
expected: InfoIcon button present adjacent to label
notes: InfoIcon button (circled 'i') adjacent to Directly label.

test_case: Tooltip appears on hover over info icon
expected: Tooltip content with When enabled/disabled sections
notes: Tooltip appears with both When enabled and When disabled sections.

test_case: Tooltip content includes both enabled and disabled descriptions
expected: When enabled with bullets, When disabled with bullets
notes: Both sections with correct bullet lists confirmed.

test_case: Clicking switch toggles from ON to OFF
expected: Switch unchecked, Audience/Prompt disappear, Disabled banner appears
notes: Switch unchecked, sections hidden, disabled banner shown with correct text.

test_case: Clicking switch toggles from OFF to ON
expected: Switch checked, Banner disappears, Audience/Prompt appear
notes: Switch checked, banner hidden, sections restored with previous values.

test_case: Toggle state persists after switching tabs
expected: Switch state remains after tab switch
notes: Toggled OFF, switched to Details, returned to Fin — state persisted.

test_case: Toggle description text reads correctly
expected: "Fin will directly trigger this connector based on your prompt"
notes: Description text matches exactly.

test_case: Audience row renders with label and dropdown trigger
expected: "Audience" label visible, Button with "Everyone" text visible
notes: Audience label and Everyone button visible.

test_case: Audience trigger has correct testid
expected: data-testid="audience-trigger" on button
notes: data-testid="audience-trigger" confirmed via JS.

test_case: Dropdown trigger shows Everyone text with icon
expected: Icon + "Everyone" text + chevron
notes: People icon, Everyone text, and chevron all present.

test_case: Clicking trigger opens dropdown with Everyone option
expected: Dropdown content with Everyone checkbox item
notes: Dropdown opens with menuitemcheckbox Everyone (checked).

test_case: Dropdown Everyone item has correct testid and is checked
expected: data-testid="audience-everyone", aria-checked=true
notes: data-testid=audience-everyone, aria-checked=true confirmed.

test_case: Prompt section renders with label and textarea
expected: "Prompt" label visible, Textarea with placeholder
notes: Prompt label and textarea with placeholder present.

test_case: Textarea has correct placeholder
expected: "Describe when Fin should trigger this connector..."
notes: Placeholder matches exactly via JS evaluate.

test_case: Help text renders below textarea
expected: Help text about describing when Fin should trigger
notes: Help text paragraph renders below textarea and Optimize button.

test_case: See best practices link is present
expected: Link with target=_blank to intercom.com help article
notes: href, target=_blank, rel=noopener noreferrer all verified.

test_case: Textarea accepts text input
expected: Typing updates value, text appears
notes: Cleared and typed new text successfully.

test_case: Textarea auto-expands with content
expected: Height increases with multi-line text, no scroll
notes: Height grew from 66px to 192px. scrollHeight===clientHeight (no overflow).

test_case: Textarea has maxLength of 30000 characters
expected: maxLength=30000 attribute
notes: el.maxLength===30000 confirmed via JS.

test_case: Optimize button enables when text is entered
expected: Disabled when empty, enabled with text
notes: Button disabled with empty textarea, enabled after typing text.

test_case: Textarea value persists on save
expected: Value persists after save and reload
notes: T3: Requires save API to be fully working.

test_case: Optimize button renders in idle state
expected: Button with AiStarsIcon and Optimize text, variant=secondary
notes: Button with sparkle icon, Optimize text, secondary variant confirmed.

test_case: Optimize button is disabled when prompt is empty
expected: Button has disabled attribute when textarea empty
notes: Button gains [disabled] when textarea cleared.

test_case: Optimize button has correct testid
expected: data-testid="ai-optimize-button"
notes: data-testid=ai-optimize-button confirmed in shadow DOM.

test_case: Clicking Optimize triggers loading state
expected: Thinking... text, Stop button, Optimize disappears
notes: Used fetch interceptor to hold request. Thinking text, Stop button, Optimize hidden — all confirmed.

test_case: Stop button has correct testid
expected: data-testid="ai-optimize-stop"
notes: data-testid=ai-optimize-stop confirmed during loading state.

test_case: Loading state shows Thinking... text
expected: Text Thinking... with muted styling
notes: Thinking... text with class text-caption text-muted confirmed via fetch interceptor.

test_case: Successful API response shows suggestion panel
expected: AI suggestion panel with reasoning, Apply/Dismiss
notes: Requires backend API generate_code_block_suggestion running locally.

test_case: Apply button replaces prompt with suggestion
expected: Clicking Apply updates textarea, panel disappears
notes: Requires backend API. Depends on AI-007.

test_case: Dismiss button removes suggestion panel
expected: Clicking Dismiss hides panel, returns to idle
notes: Requires backend API. Depends on AI-007.

test_case: Error shows notification toast
expected: Error notification Failed to generate suggestion
notes: Red error toast with exact text captured — backend naturally offline.

test_case: Disabled banner renders when toggle is OFF
expected: Banner with alert icon, heading, description
notes: Banner renders with all elements when toggle OFF.

test_case: Banner heading text is correct
expected: "Fin will not run this connector directly."
notes: Heading text matches, text-support-bold class, font-weight 600.

test_case: Banner description text is correct
expected: "It must be added to a Workflow, Task, Procedure..."
notes: Full description text matches exactly.

test_case: Using Data connectors link button is present
expected: Button with KnowledgeIcon, links to help article
notes: Link with KnowledgeIcon SVG, correct href.

test_case: ContentSquare alert icon renders
expected: TinyAlertIcon inside colored square
notes: 24x24 container, bg-notice-container (yellow), 12x12 SVG icon.

test_case: Help link opens in new tab
expected: target=_blank, rel=noopener noreferrer
notes: Both attributes confirmed.

test_case: Card renders with correct heading
expected: Card with h3 heading
notes: h3 heading How should Fin use this connector? confirmed.

test_case: Card has max-width 800px centered layout
expected: max-w-[800px], centered with px-6 pt-5
notes: maxWidth=800px, flex justify-center, px-6 pt-5 all confirmed.

test_case: Toggle ON shows Audience + Prompt, hides banner
expected: AudienceRow + PromptSection visible, DisabledBanner hidden
notes: Audience=true, Prompt=true, Banner=false.

test_case: Toggle OFF shows banner, hides Audience + Prompt
expected: DisabledBanner visible, AudienceRow + PromptSection hidden
notes: Audience=false, Prompt=false, Banner=true.

test_case: Toggling ON→OFF→ON preserves prompt text
expected: Prompt text preserved through toggle cycle
notes: Text New data connector desc preserved after OFF→ON cycle.

test_case: Tab navigation to Fin tab loads correct content
expected: Content loads correctly after tab round-trip
notes: Details→Fin round-trip: all content rendered correctly.

test_case: Sections vertically stacked with gap-6 spacing
expected: Consistent 24px vertical spacing
notes: flex flex-col gap-6: computed gap=24px confirmed.

test_case: Card component present (Figma extraction row 1)
expected: Card container with heading + form rows
notes: Generic container with h3 heading + 3 form rows. design_match: CONFIRMED

test_case: Switch has role=switch (Figma extraction row 6)
expected: role=switch, aria-checked
notes: role=switch with aria-checked toggling correctly. design_match: CONFIRMED

test_case: Tooltip trigger has role=button (Figma extraction row 4)
expected: button adjacent to Directly text
notes: role=button with img child (info icon). design_match: CONFIRMED

test_case: Audience trigger Button (Figma extraction row 9)
expected: role=button with Everyone text
notes: role=button with Everyone text, people icon, chevron. design_match: CONFIRMED

test_case: Textarea has role=textbox (Figma extraction row 12)
expected: role=textbox with placeholder
notes: role=textbox with correct placeholder. design_match: CONFIRMED

test_case: Optimize button role=button (Figma extraction row 15)
expected: role=button with Optimize text
notes: role=button with Optimize text and sparkle icon. design_match: CONFIRMED

test_case: Banner alert styling matches design (Figma Contextual-alert)
expected: Border, rounded corners, bg-base-module — REVIEW
notes: Banner renders with yellow alert icon, correct text. Visual styling needs human review. design_match: REVIEW

test_case: Suggestion panel styling matches design
expected: border border-neutral-border rounded-medium
notes: Requires backend API to render suggestion panel. design_match: MISSING
